title: Alumni Meet 2024
content: Dec, 07 2024 at 09:30 am JUIT Auditorium Alumni Meet 2024 Dear Alumni, JUIT Home Calling! "Mark your calendar, don’t miss the fun, At our alumni meet, we’ll shine like the sun!" Are you feeling overwhelmed with pending presentations and early morning meetings? Do you find yourself cancelling plans with old friends because life gets too busy? It’s time to take a break and reflect on the carefree days of our past. Join us for a Journey Down Memory Lane! Let’s dust off those yearbooks and reconnect with the incredible community we built together. We invite you to relive your legacy and indulge in heartfelt nostalgia. Date: December 7, 2024 Venue: JUIT Campus For Graduates of 2006-2014 Calling all alumni from 2006 to 2014, It’s time to gather, reminisce, and feel the thrill! Whether it’s been a decade or fifteen years, We’ll laugh, share stories, and maybe some cheers. This year celebrates Crystal and Tin, But every alum has memories within. This day is for all—each journey, each face, To celebrate together in one special place Come join us for a day of joy and pride, As we reunite with friends from far and wide! Your participation means the world to us, and we would love to hear your suggestions and ideas to make this meet a memorable one. To help us with the preparations, please take a moment to fill out the Google form linked below. Additionally, if you’re part of your year’s alumni WhatsApp group or LinkedIn page, please share this invitation within your network! Looking forward to seeing you at JUIT once again! https://forms.gle/ HD2DSyAUJSJ5Ao967 Warm regards, Unnati Pant Student President, Alumni Cell, JUIT <
